summary: DBeaver Community installer, combo group presets, and database menu integration
changes: Added Script 32 (32-install-dbeaver) -- installs DBeaver Community Edition via Chocolatey
Added dbeaver, db-viewer, dbviewer install keywords (ID 32)
Added DBeaver to databases/config.json as type 'tool' for interactive database menu
Added all-dev combo groups: o (All Dev+MySQL), p (All Dev+PostgreSQL), r (All Dev+PostgreSQL+Redis), s (SQLite+DBeaver), t (All DBs+DBeaver)
Added database menu groups: f (Popular+DBeaver), g (All+DBeaver)
Updated registry.json, orchestrator config sequence, and Everything group to include script 32
